testcase.classname: Search Feature - Behavior Tests Dropdown Visibility should not render when isOpen is false
testcase.name: Search Feature - Behavior Tests Dropdown Visibility should not render when isOpen is false

testcase.classname: Search Feature - Behavior Tests Dropdown Visibility should render when isOpen is true
testcase.name: Search Feature - Behavior Tests Dropdown Visibility should render when isOpen is true

testcase.classname: Search Feature - Behavior Tests Empty Query Behavior should show no results and skip API call for empty or whitespace-only query
testcase.name: Search Feature - Behavior Tests Empty Query Behavior should show no results and skip API call for empty or whitespace-only query

testcase.classname: Search Feature - Behavior Tests API Request Behavior should make GET request to /api/tracks/search with query parameter
testcase.name: Search Feature - Behavior Tests API Request Behavior should make GET request to /api/tracks/search with query parameter

testcase.classname: Search Feature - Behavior Tests API Request Behavior should include authorization header in API request
testcase.name: Search Feature - Behavior Tests API Request Behavior should include authorization header in API request

testcase.classname: Search Feature - Behavior Tests Debounce Behavior should not make API call before debounce delay completes when query changes
testcase.name: Search Feature - Behavior Tests Debounce Behavior should not make API call before debounce delay completes when query changes

testcase.classname: Search Feature - Behavior Tests Debounce Behavior should make API call after debounce delay (300ms) when query changes
testcase.name: Search Feature - Behavior Tests Debounce Behavior should make API call after debounce delay (300ms) when query changes

testcase.classname: Search Feature - Behavior Tests Loading State should show loading indicator while waiting for API response
testcase.name: Search Feature - Behavior Tests Loading State should show loading indicator while waiting for API response

testcase.classname: Search Feature - Behavior Tests Loading State should hide loading indicator after API response is received
testcase.name: Search Feature - Behavior Tests Loading State should hide loading indicator after API response is received

testcase.classname: Search Feature - Behavior Tests Results Display should display correct results count (singular/plural) based on number of tracks
testcase.name: Search Feature - Behavior Tests Results Display should display correct results count (singular/plural) based on number of tracks

testcase.classname: Search Feature - Behavior Tests Results Display should display complete track information (title, artist, album, duration)
testcase.name: Search Feature - Behavior Tests Results Display should display complete track information (title, artist, album, duration)

testcase.classname: Search Feature - Behavior Tests No Results State should display 'No results found' when API returns empty array
testcase.name: Search Feature - Behavior Tests No Results State should display 'No results found' when API returns empty array

testcase.classname: Search Feature - Behavior Tests Error State should display error message when API fails or throws
testcase.name: Search Feature - Behavior Tests Error State should display error message when API fails or throws

testcase.classname: Search Feature - Behavior Tests Track Selection Navigation should navigate to track detail page and close dropdown when track is clicked
testcase.name: Search Feature - Behavior Tests Track Selection Navigation should navigate to track detail page and close dropdown when track is clicked

testcase.classname: Search Feature - Behavior Tests Search Result Item Accessibility should render search results as clickable buttons
testcase.name: Search Feature - Behavior Tests Search Result Item Accessibility should render search results as clickable buttons

testcase.classname: Search Service GET /api/tracks/search should return track search results with populated artist and album info
testcase.name: Search Service GET /api/tracks/search should return track search results with populated artist and album info

testcase.classname: Search Service GET /api/tracks/search should use prefix-based matching (case-insensitive)
testcase.name: Search Service GET /api/tracks/search should use prefix-based matching (case-insensitive)

testcase.classname: Search Service GET /api/tracks/search should limit results to maximum 5 tracks
testcase.name: Search Service GET /api/tracks/search should limit results to maximum 5 tracks

testcase.classname: Search Service GET /api/tracks/search should return empty array for empty query
testcase.name: Search Service GET /api/tracks/search should return empty array for empty query

testcase.classname: Search Service GET /api/tracks/search should return empty array for whitespace-only query
testcase.name: Search Service GET /api/tracks/search should return empty array for whitespace-only query

testcase.classname: Search Service GET /api/tracks/search should return empty array when no matches found
testcase.name: Search Service GET /api/tracks/search should return empty array when no matches found

testcase.classname: Search Service GET /api/tracks/search should return 401 Unauthorized without token
testcase.name: Search Service GET /api/tracks/search should return 401 Unauthorized without token

testcase.classname: Search Service GET /api/tracks/search should return 401 Unauthorized with invalid token
testcase.name: Search Service GET /api/tracks/search should return 401 Unauthorized with invalid token

testcase.classname: Search Service GET /api/tracks/search should handle special characters in search query
testcase.name: Search Service GET /api/tracks/search should handle special characters in search query

testcase.classname: Search Service GET /api/tracks/search should return empty array without q parameter
testcase.name: Search Service GET /api/tracks/search should return empty array without q parameter
